chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-629 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 30-10-2025 Mr. Ratan Kumar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for respondents No.3&4. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Learned counsel for Respondents No.3 and 4 files a statement to the effect that the petitioner shall be re-appointed for a period of one year on a contract basis, subject to satisfactory performance, on humanitarian grounds. The statement is taken on record, and a copy thereof has been provided to learned counsel for the petitioner, who, after going through the same, expresses his satisfaction and, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. Order accordingly. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
